name: werkstoff
description: My personal Claude Code plugin workshop.

plugins.name: self-assess
plugins.description: Self-assessment for live, actively-maintained codebases: import-graph-based stage/wire mapping, docs-vs-code drift detection, CI/CD topology audit, house-rules convention enforcement, and a multi-repo portfolio dashboard — read-only, writes only to a scoped output directory (default analysis/self-assess/**, configurable).

plugins.name: confab
plugins.description: AI-generated-code quality auditing for live, actively-maintained codebases: dependency-hallucination detection, LLM-reasoned assertion/mutation strength auditing, machine-checkable contract-drift detection, self-referential agentic-loop reliability auditing, plus preflight and status meta-skills, a diff-scoped pre-commit variant (confab-code-change), and a bounded autonomous self-optimization cycle (confab-cycle) with a persistent ledger and an opt-in propose/fix mode — read-only except a scoped output directory, one skill (confab-dependency-audit) with read-only network egress to public package registries, and one skill (confab-cycle, fix mode only) with narrowly-scoped Edit access to apply and re-verify dependency/contract-drift/agentic-reliability fixes.

plugins.name: compass
plugins.description: A Claude-Code-native reasoning-composition plugin for complex/vague tasks: 13 skills grounded in prompt-engineering techniques from universal-creator (clarify-scope, explore-branches, decompose-chain, reason-verify, ground-evidence, draft-revise, calibrate-format, optimize-instruction, investigate-dynamically, map-relationships, negotiate-tradeoffs, verify-assumptions, summarize-trace), composed by compass-solve into an actual workflow rather than exposed as a technique picker.

plugins.name: cupertino
plugins.description: A Steve-Jobs-grounded design and craft discipline for a project's whole lifecycle, not just UI polish: 10 skills, each grounded in a specific, real Jobs/Apple decision (the 1997 return-to-Apple product-line cut, NeXTSTEP-to-Apple-Silicon's unbroken lineage, Alan Kay's whole-widget line, iPhone/iPod foam-core prototyping, Time Machine's transfiguration of backup, iPhone/iPad unboxing-as-theater, the iPhone cannibalizing the iPod), composed by cupertino-review into one fixed lifecycle pipeline rather than exposed as a technique picker.

plugins.name: andon
plugins.description: Evidence-grounded harden-and-advance loop for live, actively-maintained codebases: propose maximally from the code/artifacts/best-practice, verify adversarially against evidence rather than authority across seven proof strategies chosen by wire type, and advance only past a proven wire (the andon rule) — never past a broken or unproven one. Composable skill family (preflight, propose, verify, loop, status) over a native OKF ledger, read-only except a scoped output directory.

plugins.name: cli-scaffold
plugins.description: Scaffolds production-grade CLI apps across 12 languages (Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, Ruby, PHP, Perl, .NET, Rust, Go, Bash, Zsh, PowerShell, POSIX sh), grouped into three paradigm skills (compiled, interpreted, shell) plus a shared architecture doctrine and a front-door orchestrator. Generation is freeform every time — no stored boilerplate — guided strictly by five pillars: UX/discoverability, backend/core separation, stability (frozen exit-code contract, snapshot-tested --help), idiomatic per-ecosystem distribution, and Unix composability. A read-only verifier agent checks generated output against the doctrine before it's presented.
